volumes.title: 毛泽东选集 第一卷

volumes.title: 毛泽东选集 第二卷
volumes.notes: Candidate range confirmed from PDF outline and extracted page checks; page 208 is the volume 2 title page and page 465 starts volume 3.

volumes.title: 毛泽东选集 第三卷
volumes.notes: Candidate range confirmed from PDF outline and extracted page checks; page 465 is the volume 3 title page and page 650 starts volume 4.

volumes.title: 毛泽东选集 第四卷
volumes.notes: Candidate range confirmed from extracted page checks; page 650 is the volume 4 header page and page 885 starts volume 5.

volumes.title: 毛泽东选集 第五卷
volumes.notes: Candidate range confirmed from extracted page checks; page 885 is the volume 5 header page and page 1186 starts the Jinghuo edition of volume 6.

volumes.title: 毛泽东选集 第六卷（静火版）
volumes.notes: Candidate range confirmed from extracted page checks; page 1186 is the Jinghuo edition volume 6 header page and page 1492 starts the Jinghuo edition volume 7.

volumes.title: 毛泽东选集 第七卷（静火版）
volumes.notes: Candidate range confirmed from extracted page checks; page 1492 is the Jinghuo edition volume 7 header page and page 1808 starts a separate Runzhi Chiqi edition block, so the current 1-7 mainline stops at page 1807.
